ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lifts" (
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lift */,
  "lift_name" TEXT /* Name of the lift */,
  "lift_type" INTEGER /* Type of the lift (foreign key to lift_types) */,
  "vpm" REAL /* Vertical People Meters per minute (VPM) */,
  "vertical_rise" REAL /* Vertical rise of the lift in meters */,
  "ride_time" REAL /* Ride time of the lift in minutes */,
  "line_speed" REAL /* Line speed of the lift in meters per second */,
  "line_length" REAL /* Line length of the lift in meters */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to additional information or documentation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the lift on the mountain */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the lift can carry at once */,
  "operational_hours_start" TEXT /* Time the lift starts operation */,
  "operational_hours_end" TEXT /* Time the lift stops operation */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last safety inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled safety inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifts_lift_type FOREIGN KEY ("lift_type") REFERENCES lift_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lift type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the lift type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lift type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operational record */,
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lift */,
  "operation_date" TEXT /* Date of the operational record */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the lift (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the lift (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the maintenance */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the lift on the given date */,
  "shift_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the operator's shift */,
  "shift_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the operator's shift */,
  "downtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Total downtime in minutes during the operational period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_operations_lift_id FOREIGN KEY ("lift_id") REFERENCES lifts ("lift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guest_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest experience record */,
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lift */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the experience record */,
  "wait_time" REAL /* Average wait time for the lift in minutes */,
  "ride_time" REAL /* Average ride time for the lift in minutes */,
  "guest_feedback" TEXT /* Guest feedback or comments */,
  "total_riders" INTEGER /* Total number of guests who used the lift on the given date */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by guests for the lift experience */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the lift operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_guest_experience_lift_id FOREIGN KEY ("lift_id") REFERENCES lifts ("lift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lift_safety" (
  "safety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety record */,
  "lift_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lift */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the safety inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "safety_status" TEXT /* Safety status of the lift (e.g., safe, needs repair) */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding compliance */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "safety_score" INTEGER /* Numerical score indicating the overall safety of the lift (e.g., 1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("safety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lift_safety_lift_id FOREIGN KEY ("lift_id") REFERENCES lifts ("lift_id")
)
